## 📄 Document/Section
Which document or section needs improvement?

## 📝 Current Content
What is the current content or what's missing?

## ✏️ Suggested Change
What should be added, updated, or clarified?

## 🔗 References
Add any relevant links or references.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, attach screenshots to show what needs to be documented.
